title: Allogene Therapeutics Presents Updated ALLO-501/501A Phase 1 Data in Large B Cell Lymphoma at the American Society of Clinical Oncology (ASCO) Annual Meeting
text: Allogene presented updated Phase 1 data from the ALPHA and ALPHA2 trials of ALLO-501 and ALLO-501A (later developed as cema-cel) at ASCO 2023. The data demonstrated the efficacy and safety profile of these allogeneic CAR T candidates in relapsed/refractory large B-cell lymphoma. The presentation highlighted the long-term durability of responses and supported advancement to the Phase 2 ALPHA3 pivotal trial in the first-line consolidation setting.
